executive_summary: Build failure detected in repository loginkarun/scib_demo on branch main. The build failed due to a critical configuration error where the GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) was not found or is inaccessible. This prevented the workflow from being dispatched and no GitHub Actions run was created. Total errors: 1 (1 critical).

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error. The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository or is not accessible with the current permissions.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml is missing from the repository at the specified branch (main), or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access the workflow, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory if it doesn't exist
2. Create build.yml workflow file with Maven build configuration
4. Set up Java environment and Maven build steps
5. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
6. Verify GitHub token has workflow permissions
recommended_fix.workflow_template:
name: Maven Build

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: '11'
          distribution: 'temurin'
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn clean install

errors.compliance_notes: Workflow file creation requires repository write access. Ensure proper approval workflow for infrastructure changes. Document workflow configuration in compliance audit trail.

api_call_reason: No GitHub Actions run was created due to workflow file not found error. Cannot fetch workflow logs as no run ID exists.
next_steps: 2. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for repository
3. Verify GitHub token has workflow permissions
4. Retry build after workflow file is created

audit_trail.classification_method: Automated error pattern matching and categorization
audit_trail.compliance_status: Error classified and documented per DevOps audit requirements
